event_title: April 2011 San Francisco Hadoop User Meetup
title: April 2011 San Francisco Hadoop User Meetup
description: The April Hadoop meetup will be held Wednesday, April 13, from 6pm to 8pm. This meetup will be hosted by our friends at Twitter. Their office is at 795 Folsom St. (4th and Folsom) As usual, we will use the discussion-based "unconference" format. At the beginning of the meetup we will collaboratively construct an agenda consisting of several discussion breakout groups. All participants may propose a topic and volunteer to facilitate a discussion. All Hadoop-related topics are encouraged, and all members of the Hadoop community are welcome. Event schedule: 6pm - Welcome 6:30pm - Introductions; start creating agenda Breakout sessions begin as soon as we're ready 8pm - Conclusion Pizza and refreshments will be provided, courtesy of Twitter.
